merge_notes: Two agents (codex and openclaw) independently analyzed real market data and both concluded no stocks matched the floor-ceiling pattern criteria during the specified period (20 trading days before 2024-09-23). ClaudeCode found one match (300001) but explicitly stated it used simulated data due to network limitations, making its result unreliable. The consensus based on real data is that no qualifying patterns exist. All successful agents implemented comprehensive logic covering amplitude checks, ST/new stock exclusions, seal strength, and continuation criteria. The preferred solution (codex) provides both the correct result file and executable code demonstrating the complete methodology.
